measured_by: astrometry.net blind solves of the set's first and last frames (scripts/calibrate/solve_field.py); sensor-centre sky positions from the linear WCS
purpose: re-aim scatter input for the 5-set combined render: -framing=min keeps only the area common to ALL frames, so the cross-set aim spread decides single-combined-stack vs stack-per-set fallback
mount_check: declared fixed CONFIRMED from the data: RA advances at the sidereal rate to <0.1% with Dec constant to 55 arcsec — a direction fixed in the rotating Earth frame

re_aim_offset_vs_set01.vs: set-01 solved stack centre RA 310.787 Dec +46.792
